title: Olifer
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Olifer |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] *[[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Okay, Wires. Have it your way. Lieutenant Commander Olifer seems like a reasonable man.... The fact that you have appropriated thirty-two percent of the tracking computer's excess capacity for your own personal gain won't bother him in the least."
"What's the problem, Chiefy? I'm busy.|Warrant Officer Wong gets Wires' attention|}} [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] '''Olifer''' was stationed aboard the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[New Hope]]'' during the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]]. During this time, Olifer was unaware that the ship's [[Technician/Legends|technician]], [[Wires]], was using thirty-two percent of the excess capacity of the ship's tracking computer to run a virtual gambling [[Casino/Legends|casino]]. When [[Chief Warrant Officer]] [[Xiong Wong]] needed Wires help in decoding a [[Datacard/Legends|datadisc]], Wong threatened to reveal the casino to Olifer if Wires did not comply. As a result, Wires decoded the datadisc, while Olifer remained ignorant of the casino. ==Behind the scenes== Olifer was created for the [[1998]] novella ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'', which was written by [[William C. Dietz]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Defense Fleet officers]]
